summary: Iteration 3 frontend re-test of the NERV Evangelion portfolio. All review-request scenarios PASS on the public preview URL. The 3 new silhouette interlude sections render correctly with data-testid='quote-rei', 'quote-asuka', and 'quote-shinji' — each contains an inline SVG figure (FigureRei / FigureAsuka / FigureShinji) + a JP quote wrapped in 「」 brackets + an English quote + footer metadata (CODENAME / DESIG / SOURCE). Adjacent EVA-UI image panels load 200 OK: quote-rei has https://i.imgur.com/TkOO9fF.jpg (704x480) AND https://i.imgur.com/6mDPV0L.jpg (704x480); quote-asuka has customer-assets …umbz8vym_image.png (637x358 — Harmonics graph reference); quote-shinji has customer-assets …h91tlhtk_image.png (896x337 — MAGI deliberation reference) — 4 distinct image references in total as specified. All 8 section headers (FILE-01..08) render their Japanese titles in foreground orange + faded JP watermark: 人事記録 (Personnel), 作戦記録 (Operations), 同期率測定 (Skills/Sync), 経済分析部 (Economics), 勲章記録 (Achievements), 美術資料 (Gallery), 現状報告 (Status), 通信端末 (Contact) — all confirmed in document.body.innerText. Previously working functionality remains intact: 9 nav buttons present (nav-home/personnel/operations/skills/economics/achievements/gallery/status/contact), mode-toggle adds .pro-mode class, sound-toggle present, resume-download present, nerv-logo-btn x10 triggers [data-testid='third-impact'], ` (tilde) opens [data-testid='secret-terminal'], Konami code opens [data-testid='seele-overlay'], operation-OP-001 click opens [data-testid='operation-modal'] and close-modal closes it, terminate-session triggers [data-testid='ending-screen']. Zero console errors, zero page errors.

integration_issues.issue: Pre-existing (carried from iteration 2): Web3Forms still uses placeholder access_key MOCKED — UI shows 'TRANSMISSION COMPLETE' regardless. Not retested this round; no regression expected.

critical_code_review_comments: SilhouetteQuote.jsx defines three SVG figure components inline (~80 lines). For App.js readability they could optionally be split per-figure later, but currently the file is well within size limits and clean.

SectionHeader watermark uses font-jp text-nerv-orange/10 5xl/7xl — readable contrast is fine; consider verifying on very low-DPI displays that the faded watermark doesn't compete with foreground titleJp at md breakpoint (visually OK in 1920x4000 test viewport).
Carried from iteration_2: MagiHexDisplay / HarmonicsGraph still run setInterval/RAF off-screen — minor CPU waste, not a regression.

Imgur images on the rei interlude rely on Cloudflare-fronted i.imgur.com URLs (returns image/png despite .jpg extension). They render fine but mirroring under /public or customer-assets would be safer long-term.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all iteration-3 scenarios + iteration-2 regression scenarios verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Iteration 3 verified. New components: SilhouetteQuote.jsx exports default + named FigureRei/FigureAsuka/FigureShinji; JpAccents.jsx exists but is NOT currently wired into any section header (SectionHeader in TerminalPanel.jsx renders the JP title + watermark inline via the new titleJp prop). Silhouette interlude testids: quote-rei, quote-asuka, quote-shinji — all are
elements with grid-cols-12. Each interlude contains a SilhouetteQuote panel plus 1-2 sibling tags referencing EVA UI assets. Boot still gated by localStorage 'nerv_boot_done_v1'. All testids from iteration_1/2 unchanged.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Iteration 3 additions (3 SilhouetteQuote interludes, 8 Japanese section titles + watermarks, 4 EVA-UI reference images) all render and integrate cleanly; no regressions detected in any iteration_2 feature.
